query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.projectId,
  p.amount,
  p.movementType,
  pr.name as projectName
FROM payments p
LEFT JOIN projects pr ON p.projectId = pr.id
WHERE p.movementType = 'discount'
ORDER BY p.projectId
